name: Quote Social Card
description: A striking quote, slogan, or manifesto card for social sharing, with high typographic impact.
usage: Use for one strong statement, campaign slogan, quote excerpt, creator cover, or announcement card.
best_for: One strong statement, campaign slogan, quote excerpt, creator cover, or announcement card.
Briefs where typography and mood matter more than many content sections.
avoid_for: Long articles, multi-step guides, and data-heavy reports.
Product pages that need detailed feature explanations.
layout_rules: Use one fixed artboard such as 1080x1080, 1080x1350, or the user-specified ratio.
Make the quote the main composition; attribution and CTA should be secondary.
Use large negative space, strong alignment, and one memorable visual motif.
Avoid multiple equal-weight cards or unrelated decorations.
style_rules: Use a bold but controlled palette with strong contrast and one accent detail.
Let type shape the image through scale shifts, line breaks, and careful emphasis.
Use texture, borders, or abstract CSS/SVG forms only to frame the quote.
Keep the design legible when shared as a compressed social image.
content_rules: Preserve the exact quote wording when provided.
Keep support copy short enough not to compete with the quote.
Use a closing mark, date, or brand line only when provided or requested.
quality_checks: The card should be understandable in one glance.
The quote must not overflow or be forced into tiny type.
Attribution and CTA must be clearly subordinate to the main statement.
